entry.string: Using shallow clone for branch: dev/DEV-6/trading_agent-fundamentals
Feature branch detected: JIRA issue=DEV-6, project=trading_agent, subproject=fundamentals

echo "Response code: 401" echo "Curl debug log (showing auth header info):" grep -i 'authorization\|www-authenticate\|401\|403' /tmp/jira_test_curl_debug.log | head -10 || cat /tmp/jira_test_curl_debug.log | tail -30 echo "" echo "Response body:" cat /tmp/jira_test_response.json | head -20 || echo "No response body"
⚠️ WARNING: JIRA authentication failed (HTTP 401). Please check JIRA_USER and JIRA_API_TOKEN credentials. Note: New tokens may take up to a minute to activate. Pipeline will continue.
echo "Response code: 404" echo "Curl debug log:" cat /tmp/jira_curl_debug.log | tail -20 || true echo "" echo "Response body:" cat /tmp/jira_response.json | head -50 || true
⚠️ WARNING: JIRA issue DEV-6 does not exist (HTTP 404). Please verify the issue exists at https://vittorioapi91.atlassian.net/browse/DEV-6. Pipeline will continue.

if [ ! -d "src/fundamentals" ]; then echo "ERROR: Module path does not exist: src/fundamentals" echo "Available modules in src/:" ls -d src/*/ 2>/dev/null | xargs -n 1 basename || echo "No modules found" exit 1 fi echo "✓ Module path exists: src/fundamentals" echo "Module contents:" ls -la "src/fundamentals" | head -20
Check Registry and Build Docker Image

wf.a.LabelAction.displayName: Check Registry and Build Docker Image

entry.string: Make Image Available to Kind Cluster

wf.a.LabelAction.displayName: Make Image Available to Kind Cluster

entry.string: Making image available to kind cluster: trading-cluster

# Try to pull from registry in kind cluster (faster than kind load) # If registry is not accessible from kind, fall back to kind load if kubectl run --rm -i --restart=Never --image=curlimages/curl:latest test-registry-$$ --context kind-trading-cluster -- curl -s -f http://localhost:5000/v2/ > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Registry is accessible from kind cluster - images will be pulled automatically" echo "No need to load images manually" else echo "Registry not accessible from kind - loading images directly..." kind load docker-image hmm-model-training-dev:dev-17-064429c --name trading-cluster || true kind load docker-image hmm-model-training-dev:dev-latest --name trading-cluster || true fi
kubectl create namespace trading-monitoring-dev --context kind-trading-cluster 2>/dev/null || echo "Namespace trading-monitoring-dev already exists"
Updating Kubernetes Job with new image

kubectl get job hmm-model-calibration-dev -n trading-monitoring-dev --context kind-trading-cluster || true kubectl get pods -l app=hmm-model,component=training -n trading-monitoring-dev --context kind-trading-cluster || true

# Clean up old incremental images, but preserve base images docker images hmm-model-training-dev --format '{{.Repository}}:{{.Tag}}' | \ grep -v ':base$' | \ sed 's/.*://' | \ grep -E '^dev-[0-9]+-' | \ sort -t- -k2 -nr | \ tail -n +11 | \ xargs -r -I {} docker rmi hmm-model-training-dev:{} || true
✗ Pipeline failed. Check logs for details.
Warning: GITHUB_TOKEN not set. Cannot post status to GitHub.
